test_cases.name: Create skill from document
test_cases.input: Convert this markdown file into a skill
assertions: P2 pattern selected for focused how-to guide

test_cases.name: Audit existing skill
test_cases.input: Review this skill and tell me what's wrong
assertions: Decision tree routes to quality matrix

test_cases.name: Fix trigger phrases
test_cases.input: This skill never loads when I ask for it
assertions: Decision tree routes to description optimization
Analyzes current description for trigger quality
Rewrites with natural language intent per TAB 5

test_cases.name: Validation loop catches errors
test_cases.input: Create a skill from this template
assertions: Loop repeats until all pass or max iterations reached

test_cases.name: Banned field rejection
test_cases.input: Create a skill with compatibility field
assertions: Agent removes field and re-runs validation
